allow: Bash(python -c "from rocketpy import Rocket; methods = [m for m in dir\(Rocket\) if ''fin'' in m.lower\(\) or ''surface'' in m.lower\(\) or ''aero'' in m.lower\(\) or ''controller'' in m.lower\(\)]; print\(methods\)")
Bash(python -c "from rocketpy import Rocket; import inspect; print\(inspect.getsource\(Rocket.add_surfaces\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from rocketpy import Rocket; import inspect; print\(inspect.getsource\(Rocket._add_controllers\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from rocketpy import Flight; import inspect; sig = inspect.signature\(Flight.__init__\); print\(list\(sig.parameters.keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from rocketpy.control import _Controller; import inspect; sig = inspect.signature\(_Controller.__init__\); print\(list\(sig.parameters.keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from rocketpy import Rocket; import inspect; print\(inspect.getsource\(Rocket.add_trapezoidal_fins\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from rocketpy import Rocket; print\([m for m in dir\(Rocket\) if ''control'' in m.lower\(\)]\)")
Bash(python -c "from rocketpy import SolidMotor; import inspect; sig = inspect.signature\(SolidMotor.__init__\); print\({k: v.default for k, v in sig.parameters.items\(\)}\)")
